name: Easy Chocolate Frosted Peanut Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 8 or 9-inch round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the cake mix, vanilla pudding, 1/2 cup peanut butter, milk, and eggs until moistened.
4. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
5. Fold in 1/2 cup chopped peanuts.
6. Pour batter into prepared pans and bake at 350°F for 35 to 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Let cakes cool in pans for 5 minutes before removing them to racks to cool completely.
8. In another bowl, mix chocolate frosting with 1/4 cup peanut butter.
9. Frost the cooled cake layers and sprinkle with the remaining chopped peanuts.
